$comment: Ready-to-paste signals.json entry for Vivienne Machi, prepared 2026-07-12 at Florian's request. The agent may not edit signals.json (CLAUDE.md never-do), and the suggestions queue requires calibration evidence she does not yet have. To apply: open src/data/signals.json and paste the object below as a new element at the end of the "people" array (add a comma after the previous entry), then run: bun scripts/check-signals.ts

entry.name: Vivienne Machi
entry.why: Military-space procurement coverage; tracks SDA-style proliferated buys and NATO space programs that shape commercial demand.
entry.notes: Added per Florian, 2026-07-12 (her HALO Debrief published as commentary the same day). Articles are AWIN-paywalled; the author page lists headlines and dates in the open.

channels.notes: Outlet author page (no personal site verified); newest article Jul 10, 2026 at verification.
